title: qavor shared definitions
description: Shared $defs referenced by every kind-specific qavor manifest schema. Has no top-level shape of its own; consume via $ref to /$defs/<name>.

name.description: Lowercase identifier. Letters, digits, dot, dash, underscore. 1-63 chars. Used as service/stateful/profile/repo/group identifiers.

envScalar.description: Scalar value usable on the right-hand side of an env entry. Strings support ${VAR} and ${secret:NAME} interpolation.

envSpec.description: Long-form env entry. Use when you need typing, validation, default vs override, secret marking, or documentation.

envMap.description: Map of env names to scalar values or long-form envSpec entries.

envBlock.description: Layered env block. `common` always applies; `native` or `docker` is layered on top depending on the active run mode. See the proposal section on Manifest Resolution Order for the full precedence chain.

statefulEnvBlock.description: Env block for a stateful service. Adds `publish`: env vars exposed to dependents at start time.

runtimeStep.description: Single shell step in a runtime block (check_installed, install, prepare, run).

cmd.description: Shell command. Multiline strings are treated as a script.

cwd.description: Working directory relative to the manifest file.

shell.description: Override shell. Defaults to `/bin/sh -c` (POSIX) or `cmd /C` on Windows.

runtimeBackend.description: Runtime backend definition. Each of `check_installed`, `install`, `prepare`, `run` is optional but ordered: install runs only when check_installed fails; prepare runs before run.

runtimeBlock.description: Available runtime backends. A service or stateful manifest may declare any subset; the active backend is chosen by the resolved `mode`.

mode.description: Run mode. `docker-compose` is only valid for stateful manifests at v0.

profileRef.description: Reference to a profile by name. Profiles are merged in declaration order; later entries win.

requirement.description: A single dependency edge. Exactly one of `service`, `stateful`, or `group` must be set.

waitFor.description: Whether to wait for process-up or for the readiness probe to pass before starting dependents.

hookCommands.description: One or more shell commands or paths to executable scripts, run in the manifest's directory.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks. Each hook list runs in the manifest's directory at the corresponding lifecycle event.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Defaults to 1 if omitted.
